message:
fix(test): correct test expectations for error handling and formatting

- cli-init: check errors + logs for warning output (not just logs)
- team-workflow: use toBeGreaterThan(0) for non-zero exit code
- utils.formatting: fix singular form expectations (1 week/month/year)
